codes.term: Heart failure as a complication of care (disorder)
codes.rationale: Heart failure as a complication of care is secondary heart failure resulting from medical intervention, not primary heart failure.

codes.term: Right ventricular failure due to disorder of lung (disorder)
codes.rationale: Right ventricular failure due to lung disorder may represent secondary heart failure from pulmonary disease rather than primary heart failure; clinical judgment needed on whether pulmonary-driven RV failure qualifies as 'primary' heart failure.

summary: Recall: 83.3% (35 of 42 reference codes retrieved). Precision: 77.8%. F1: 80.5%. 1 reference codes were incorrectly excluded.

scored_codes.rationale: Heart failure is the direct match to the queried condition 'Heart failure (primary)'.
Congestive heart failure is a clinical subtype of heart failure and explicitly names the condition.
Left ventricular failure is a clinical subtype of heart failure and explicitly names the condition.
Heart failure, unspecified is a clinical variant of heart failure and explicitly names the condition.
Chronic left-sided congestive heart failure is a direct clinical subtype of heart failure with explicit condition naming.
Acute heart failure is a primary clinical variant of heart failure representing an instance of the queried condition.
Chronic right-sided congestive heart failure is a direct clinical subtype of heart failure with explicit condition naming.

scored_codes.term: Heart failure with reduced ejection fraction (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Heart failure with reduced ejection fraction is a primary clinical classification of heart failure based on ejection fraction.

scored_codes.term: Heart failure with mid range ejection fraction (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Heart failure with mid-range ejection fraction is a primary clinical classification of heart failure based on ejection fraction.
Heart failure (disorder) is the primary generic diagnosis code for the queried condition.
Left heart failure is a direct clinical subtype of heart failure with explicit condition naming.
Chronic congestive heart failure is a direct clinical subtype of heart failure with explicit condition naming.
Biventricular congestive heart failure is a direct clinical subtype of heart failure with explicit condition naming.
Chronic right-sided heart failure is a direct instance of primary heart failure with specified laterality and chronicity.
Acute congestive heart failure is a direct instance of primary heart failure with acute presentation.
Chronic left-sided heart failure is a direct instance of primary heart failure with specified laterality and chronicity.
Right heart failure is a direct instance of primary heart failure with specified laterality.

scored_codes.term: Acute exacerbation of chronic heart failure
scored_codes.rationale: Acute exacerbation of chronic heart failure is a clinical variant of primary heart failure representing acute decompensation.

scored_codes.term: Chronic combined systolic and diastolic heart failure (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Chronic combined systolic and diastolic heart failure is a direct instance of primary heart failure with specified functional characteristics.

scored_codes.term: Acute on chronic right-sided congestive heart failure (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Acute on chronic right-sided congestive heart failure is a direct instance of primary heart failure with specified laterality and temporal pattern.
Decompensated cardiac failure is a direct instance of primary heart failure representing acute decompensation.
Compensated cardiac failure is a direct instance of primary heart failure representing stable compensation.
Acute left ventricular failure is a direct instance of primary heart failure with specified laterality and acute presentation.
Refractory heart failure is a direct instance of primary heart failure representing a severity variant resistant to treatment.
Right ventricular failure is a direct instance of primary heart failure with specified laterality.
Congestive heart failure is a direct instance of primary heart failure.

scored_codes.term: Congestive heart failure due to left ventricular systolic dysfunction (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Congestive heart failure due to left ventricular systolic dysfunction is a direct instance of primary heart failure with specified functional mechanism.

scored_codes.term: Congestive heart failure due to valvular disease (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Congestive heart failure due to valvular disease is a direct instance of primary heart failure with specified etiology.
Chronic systolic heart failure is a direct instance of primary heart failure with specified functional type and chronicity.
Chronic diastolic heart failure is a direct instance of primary heart failure with specified functional type and chronicity.

scored_codes.term: Heart failure with normal ejection fraction (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Heart failure with normal ejection fraction is a direct instance of primary heart failure with specified functional characteristic.
Chronic heart failure is a direct instance of primary heart failure with specified chronicity.
Rheumatic left ventricular failure is a direct instance of primary heart failure with specified etiology (rheumatic) and laterality.

scored_codes.term: Heart failure with reduced ejection fraction due to coronary artery disease (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Heart failure with reduced ejection fraction due to coronary artery disease is a specific etiology-based subtype of heart failure.

scored_codes.term: Heart failure with reduced ejection fraction due to myocarditis (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Heart failure with reduced ejection fraction due to myocarditis is a specific etiology-based subtype of heart failure.

scored_codes.term: Heart failure with reduced ejection fraction due to cardiomyopathy (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Heart failure with reduced ejection fraction due to cardiomyopathy is a specific etiology-based subtype of heart failure.

scored_codes.term: Heart failure with reduced ejection fraction due to heart valve disease (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Heart failure with reduced ejection fraction due to heart valve disease is a specific etiology-based subtype of heart failure.
Congestive rheumatic heart failure is a specific etiology-based subtype of heart failure due to rheumatic disease.
Heart failure due to thyrotoxicosis is a specific etiology-based subtype of heart failure.

scored_codes.term: Low output heart failure due to and following Fontan operation (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Low output heart failure due to Fontan operation is a specific etiology-based subtype of heart failure in congenital heart disease.
Ischaemic cardiomyopathy is a form of cardiomyopathy caused by ischaemic heart disease that directly results in heart failure; it is a clinical subtype of heart failure.

scored_codes.term: Left ventricular failure with normal ejection fraction due to valvular heart disease (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Left ventricular failure due to valvular heart disease is a manifestation of heart failure caused by a specific etiology; the term explicitly contains 'left ventricular failure'.

scored_codes.term: Right ventricular failure due to heart valve disorder (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Right ventricular failure due to heart valve disorder is a manifestation of heart failure caused by valvular disease; the term explicitly contains 'right ventricular failure'.
Left ventricular failure with sepsis is a manifestation of heart failure in the context of sepsis; the term explicitly contains 'left ventricular failure'.
Right ventricular failure with sepsis is a manifestation of heart failure in the context of sepsis; the term explicitly contains 'right ventricular failure'.
Neonatal cardiac failure explicitly names heart failure but is specific to neonates; inclusion depends on whether the 'primary' heart failure list should include neonatal-specific codes.

Dilated cardiomyopathy is a structural heart condition that commonly causes heart failure; inclusion depends on whether cardiomyopathies that directly lead to heart failure should be included as clinical subtypes.

Obstructive hypertrophic cardiomyopathy is a structural heart condition that may cause heart failure; inclusion depends on whether cardiomyopathies that directly lead to heart failure should be included as clinical subtypes.

Other hypertrophic cardiomyopathy is a structural heart condition that may cause heart failure; inclusion depends on whether cardiomyopathies that directly lead to heart failure should be included as clinical subtypes.

scored_codes.term: Right ventricular failure due to disorder of lung (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Right ventricular failure due to lung disorder may represent secondary heart failure from pulmonary disease rather than primary heart failure; clinical judgment needed on whether pulmonary-driven RV failure qualifies as 'primary' heart failure.

scored_codes.term: Hypertensive heart disease with (congestive) heart failure
scored_codes.rationale: This code explicitly names heart failure in the term ('with congestive heart failure'), but it is secondary to hypertension; inclusion depends on whether secondary heart failure should be included in a 'primary' heart failure list.

scored_codes.term: Hypertensive heart and renal disease with (congestive) heart failure
scored_codes.rationale: This code explicitly names heart failure in the term ('with congestive heart failure'), but it is secondary to hypertension; inclusion depends on whether secondary heart failure should be included in a 'primary' heart failure list.

scored_codes.term: Hypertensive heart and renal disease with both (congestive) heart failure and renal failure
scored_codes.rationale: This code explicitly names heart failure in the term ('with both congestive heart failure and renal failure'), but it is secondary to hypertension; inclusion depends on whether secondary heart failure should be included in a 'primary' heart failure list.
Primary ovarian failure is an endocrine condition unrelated to heart failure; the term name does not contain 'heart' or 'failure'.
Heartburn is a gastrointestinal symptom unrelated to heart failure.

scored_codes.term: Assessment using congestive heart failure, hypertension, age 75 years or older, diabetes mellitus and previous stroke or transient ischemic attack score (procedure)
scored_codes.rationale: This is an assessment procedure (CHA₂DS₂-VASc score) used to evaluate risk, not a diagnosis code for heart failure itself.
This is an educational intervention procedure, not a diagnosis code for heart failure.
This is an administrative/management code for initial assessment regime, not a diagnosis code for heart failure.
This is a monitoring/management regime code, not a diagnosis code for heart failure.
Hypertensive heart disease is a complication of hypertension, not an instance of primary heart failure; the term does not explicitly name heart failure.

scored_codes.term: Hypertensive heart disease without (congestive) heart failure
scored_codes.rationale: This code explicitly excludes heart failure ('without congestive heart failure') and represents hypertensive heart disease without the target condition.

scored_codes.term: Hypertensive renal disease with renal failure
scored_codes.rationale: Hypertensive renal disease with renal failure is a renal complication of hypertension, not heart failure.
Hypertensive heart and renal disease is a complication of hypertension, not an instance of primary heart failure.

scored_codes.term: Hypertensive heart and renal disease with renal failure
scored_codes.rationale: Hypertensive heart and renal disease with renal failure focuses on renal failure, not heart failure as the primary condition.
Chronic hepatic failure is a hepatic condition unrelated to heart failure.
Acute renal failure is a renal complication of heart failure, not an instance of heart failure itself.
Other acute renal failure is a renal complication of heart failure, not an instance of heart failure itself.
Hypoplastic right heart syndrome is a congenital structural abnormality, not an instance of primary heart failure.
Hypoplastic left heart syndrome is a congenital structural abnormality, not an instance of primary heart failure.
Abnormalities of heart beat are a symptom that may accompany heart failure but do not represent heart failure itself.
Injury of heart is a traumatic condition, not an instance of primary heart failure.
Heart transplant status is an administrative/status code indicating prior transplantation, not a diagnosis of primary heart failure.
Congestive heart failure monitoring is a therapeutic regime/procedure code, not a diagnosis of heart failure itself.
Referral to heart failure clinic is a procedural code, not a diagnosis of heart failure.
Heart failure review completed is an administrative/procedural situation code, not a diagnosis of heart failure.
Heart failure annual review is a therapeutic regime/procedure code, not a diagnosis of heart failure.
Heart failure medication review is a procedural code, not a diagnosis of heart failure.
Other acute ischaemic heart diseases is a separate cardiac condition; while it may lead to heart failure, it is not itself an instance of heart failure.
Chronic ischaemic heart disease is a separate cardiac condition; while it may lead to heart failure, it is not itself an instance of heart failure.
Atherosclerotic heart disease is a separate cardiac condition; while it may lead to heart failure, it is not itself an instance of heart failure.
Aneurysm of heart is a separate cardiac condition; while it may lead to heart failure, it is not itself an instance of heart failure.

scored_codes.term: Other forms of chronic ischaemic heart disease
scored_codes.rationale: Other forms of chronic ischaemic heart disease is a separate cardiac condition; while it may lead to heart failure, it is not itself an instance of heart failure.
Other pulmonary heart diseases is a separate cardiac condition; while it may lead to heart failure, it is not itself an instance of heart failure.
Pulmonary heart disease, unspecified is a separate cardiac condition; while it may lead to heart failure, it is not itself an instance of heart failure.
Pulmonary valve insufficiency is a valvular condition; while it may lead to heart failure, it is not itself an instance of heart failure.
Acute respiratory failure is a complication of heart failure, not an instance of heart failure itself.
Acute respiratory failure, Type I [hypoxic] is a complication of heart failure, not an instance of heart failure itself.
Acute respiratory failure, Type II [hypercapnic] is a complication of heart failure, not an instance of heart failure itself.
Chronic respiratory failure is a complication of heart failure, not an instance of heart failure itself.
Chronic respiratory failure, Type I [hypoxic] is a complication of heart failure, not an instance of heart failure itself.
Chronic respiratory failure, Type II [hypercapnic] is a complication of heart failure, not an instance of heart failure itself.
Chronic respiratory failure, Type unspecified is a complication of heart failure, not an instance of heart failure itself.
Respiratory failure, unspecified is a complication of heart failure, not an instance of heart failure itself.
Double outlet left ventricle is a congenital cardiac anomaly; while it may lead to heart failure, it is not itself an instance of heart failure.
Heart transplant failure is a complication of transplantation, not primary heart failure.
Heart-lung transplant failure is a complication of transplantation, not primary heart failure.
Heart failure resolved is a finding indicating prior heart failure that has resolved, not an active diagnosis of primary heart failure.
Cardiomyopathy is a separate cardiac condition that may cause heart failure; it is not itself an instance of heart failure unless the term explicitly names heart failure.
Cardiomegaly is a structural finding (enlarged heart) that may result from heart failure but is not itself an instance of heart failure.

scored_codes.term: Heart failure as a complication of care (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Heart failure as a complication of care is secondary heart failure resulting from medical intervention, not primary heart failure.
